penalties.enforcementBody: National market surveillance authorities (Member State level); AI Office (GPAI models)

tiers.label: Prohibited AI Practices
tiers.trigger: Violation of Article 5 — any of the 8 prohibited practices
tiers.appliedAs: Whichever is higher for undertakings; whichever is lower for SMEs/start-ups

tiers.label: Other Substantive Obligations
tiers.trigger: Non-compliance with provider/deployer obligations (Articles 8-27, 53-55) or supply of incorrect information to authorities
tiers.appliedAs: Whichever is higher for undertakings; whichever is lower for SMEs/start-ups

tiers.label: Misleading Information
tiers.trigger: Supplying incorrect, incomplete, or misleading information to notified bodies or national authorities
tiers.appliedAs: Whichever is higher for undertakings; whichever is lower for SMEs/start-ups

notes: Fines must be effective, proportionate, and dissuasive
For large undertakings, turnover-based cap is usually binding (7%/3%/1% of global revenue)
SMEs and start-ups get the lower of the two thresholds to reduce burden
National authorities responsible for imposing penalties at Member State level

penalties.frameworkName: Interim Measures for the Management of Generative AI Services
penalties.legalBasis: Articles 16-21 (referencing Cybersecurity Law, Data Security Law, Personal Information Protection Law)
penalties.enforcementBody: Cyberspace Administration of China (CAC) and relevant sector authorities

tiers.label: Administrative Penalties
tiers.trigger: Violation of service norms, content requirements, or data governance obligations

tiers.label: Serious Violations
tiers.trigger: Content undermining state power, national security, or promoting terrorism/violence

notes: Penalties are enforced through existing Chinese cyber and data security law framework
No specific fine amounts — defers to Cybersecurity Law (up to RMB 1M), Data Security Law (up to RMB 10M), and PIPL (up to 5% revenue)
Algorithm registration non-compliance triggers CAC administrative action
Criminal liability possible for severe violations involving national security
